chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Pett. No.D-1705 of 2025 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.6713/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.6714/2025 (Ex/A) 4. For orders on CMA No.6715/2025 (S/A) 5. For hearing of main case 07.10.2025 Mr. Badaruddin Indhar, Advocate for petitioner ************** 1. Granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 4&5. Learned counsel submits that the petitioner intends to approach the Secretary, Local Government Department, Government of Sindh, for redressal of his grievance; as such, he does not press the present Constitution Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed. However, the Secretary, Local Government Department, Government of Sindh, is directed to decide the petitioner’s representation, if made, by passing a speaking order within four weeks from the date of its receipt. J U D G E J U D G E M. Ali*
